title: calamagrostis nagarum
intro: Calamagrostis nagarum, also known as a type of grass, is a species of grass native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving pain. The health benefits of Calamagrostis nagarum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
